node.statement: MAT-COMP-001: For a finite complex matrix E indexed by coarse components a and fine components b, the isometry equation E^*E=I is equivalent to the component orthogonality equations sum_b conjugate(E_{b,a}) E_{b,a'} = delta_{a,a'}. This is the scalar finite-matrix core of `summary.tex` §4.4 component-isometry equivalence ([[def:refmap]] / [[def:Hlatt]]) after choosing orthonormal component bases; it is not the full categorical direct-sum theorem for block Hom spaces. Proven in Lean at Formalisation/LinearAlgebra/Component.lean and checked by Julia/WolframScript.
